name: Kube Prometheus Stack
description: End-to-end cluster monitoring — Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager, node-exporter, kube-state-metrics, and the Prometheus Operator. Installed via Helm into the monitoring namespace.

setup_commands.command: helm repo add prometheus-community https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts --force-update && helm repo update prometheus-community
setup_commands.label: Adding Prometheus Community Helm repo

setup_commands.command: [ -f /var/run/grafana-pf.pid ] && kill $(cat /var/run/grafana-pf.pid) 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; nohup kubectl -n monitoring port-forward --address 0.0.0.0 svc/kube-prometheus-stack-grafana 3000:80 >/var/log/grafana-portforward.log 2>&1 & echo $! >/var/run/grafana-pf.pid; sleep 2; echo 'Grafana port-forward ready on :3000'
setup_commands.label: Starting Grafana port-forward

teardown_commands.command: kubectl get crd -o name | grep monitoring.coreos.com | xargs -r kubectl delete --ignore-not-found
teardown_commands.label: Removing Prometheus Operator CRDs
